stepText: Blast Furnace minigame teleport when the brewing is done and complete Forgettable Tale… Chronicle teleport, run north and give Juliet the cadavaberry potion to progress Romeo & Juliet. Head to Varrock centre and speak with Romeo to complete the quest. Start Garden of Tranquillity. Next speak with the Mage of Zamorak to complete Enter the Abyss.
itemsNeeded: 3 gp, Chronicle, beer glass (blow one molten glass?), 1 kebab (buy), 1 beer (buy), cadava potion, scrying orb
